current_multiple: 30.5x 2026 non-GAAP EPS guide; 29.7x forward PE; 14.16x EV/Sales; 86.53x EV/FCF
peer_multiple_range: NVO current peer reference: forward PE 14.41x, EV/Sales 4.40x, EV/FCF 23.59x; peer comparison is imperfect because NVO expectations and currency differ
implied_growth_duration: Market prices sustained high growth beyond FY2026 and $100B+ FY2027 revenue; current valuation assumes GLP-1 leadership and pipeline durability
implied_margin_path: Performance margin guidance 47.0%-48.5%; gross margin must remain high despite lower realized prices and access expansion
implied_roic_path: StockAnalysis ROIC 41.92%; thesis requires high ROIC despite manufacturing expansion, acquisitions and payer price pressure
what_must_go_right: Mounjaro/Zepbound volume growth continues; Foundayo expands market; payer access remains broad; realized prices stabilize; manufacturing scales; pipeline offsets eventual GLP-1 competition
what_is_already_priced: Direct GLP-1 winner status, strong 2026 growth, high margins and major pipeline optionality are already heavily priced
false_precision_warning: FY1/FY2 EPS may be non-GAAP; FCF consensus unavailable; EV rounded from StockAnalysis 1.02T; FDA approval is now regulator-verified but plan-level payer adoption and gross-to-net evidence remain incomplete.
downside_multiple: 20x downside PE on low FY2027 EPS scenario
downside_path: If payer pressure or supply/launch issues reduce growth, LLY can remain an excellent company while the stock derates toward lower pharma/growth multiples
valuation_refresh_trigger: Q2 2026 results or FY2027 consensus refresh
source_notes: Company guidance and product data from Lilly Q1 2026 8-K Exhibit 99; FDA Foundayo approval/label; CVS/CMS access sources; price/EV/current multiples and FY2026/FY2027 estimates from StockAnalysis/Finnhub; peer current multiples from StockAnalysis NVO.
